# UC-11.6.3 · Proofpoint Email DLP Policy Match Rate by Rule and Severity

## Description

Email DLP rules that fire too often create alert fatigue; rules that never fire may be misconfigured. Daily match rates by rule and severity balance privacy operations workload against coverage.

## Value

Improves DLP program maturity with data-driven tuning and gives compliance stakeholders transparent metrics on outbound data protection.

## Implementation

(1) Forward PPS DLP events with rule and severity fields. (2) Map rules to data classes (PCI, PHI, IP). (3) Set thresholds for sudden drops (possible logging break) or spikes (possible campaign). (4) Review with legal quarterly.

## SPL

```spl
index=email sourcetype="proofpoint:pps:dlp" earliest=-14d
| eval rule=coalesce(rule_name, Rule_Name, policy, Policy, "unknown")
| eval sev=coalesce(severity, Severity, "medium")
| eval action=coalesce(action, Action, "")
| bin _time span=1d
| stats count by _time rule sev
| eventstats sum(count) as daily_total by _time
| eval pct=round(100*count/daily_total,3)
| sort _time -count
```

## Visualization

Stacked area (matches over time by severity), heatmap (rule × day), table with percentage of daily volume.

- [Proofpoint — Information protection and DLP](https://www.proofpoint.com/us/products/information-protection)
